Test name: CBNA (60 km/h)

Test Description

In this scenario, the subject vehicle travels forwards towards a bicyclist which is crossing in a perpendicular direction from the nearside of the vehicle.

  • Regulation or protocol: UN Regulation No. 152
  • Ego speed: 60 km/h
  • Target speed: 15 km/h
  • Target start distance: 17 m
  • Overlap: 50%
  • TTC at start: greater than 4 s
Home Summary Repetition 1 Repetition 2 Repetition 3
←CBNA (30 km/h) CBNA (60 km/h) CBFA (20 km/h)→


Test Summary

Observations

It was recorded a 4th, 5th and sixth repetition but there was not any RT deteccions in the recording. Therefore, these repetitions were removed. Mobileye does some steps in distance between 20 to 45 m.
